---
title: "Jack Pallotta"
image: Images/Headshot.png
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jack-pallotta/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jackpallotta
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jackjpallotta@gmail.com
---

:::{#intro-heading}
Hi, thank you for visiting my website!

## Education

**The University of Tampa** | Tampa, FL | B.S. with Honors in Finance | Aug 2023 - Dec 2026 *(expected)*

## Experience

This summer I am participating in the [Carnegie Mellon Sports Analytics Camp (CMSACamp)](https://www.cmu.edu/dietrich/statistics-datascience/engagement/summer/cmsa-camp.html).

:::

### About me

blah blah blah


```{r}
1 + 1
```
